name: PB Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup C & H Golden Brown Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and peanut butter.
2. Add the biscuit mix, egg, and milk. Mix well.
3. Spoon the batter into a greased and floured 8-inch square pan.
4. Drop teaspoonfuls of jam on top of the batter.
5. Cut through the batter with a knife to marble the jam throughout the cake.
6. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
7. Cut into nine squares. Serve warm or cold.
